# cmccloudv2_mongo_configuration (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
# create Replica Set mysql configuration
resource "cmccloudv2_mongo_configuration" "mongo_conf_1" {   
    name             = "mongo-config-terraform"
    database_version = "7.0"
    database_mode    = "replica_set" 
    description      = "template for replica set mongo database"
    parameters       = {
        "replication.oplogSizeMB" = "12000"
    }
}

# create Standalone mysql configuration  
resource "cmccloudv2_mongo_configuration" "mongo_conf_2" {   
    name             = "mongo-config-terraform"
    database_version = "7.0"
    database_mode    = "standalone" 
    description      = "template for standalone mongo database"
    parameters       = {
        "security.authorization" = "enabled"
    }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `database_mode` (String) The database mode of the Mongo configuration, `replica_set`, `standalone`
- `database_version` (String) The database version of the Mongo configuration. Example `6.0`
- `name` (String) The name of the Mongo configuration
- `parameters` (Map of String) List of the parameters for the Mongo configuration

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the Mongo configuration
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>

- `create` (String)
